title: Birthday Party Planning Checklist
content:
Party Planning Checklist for June 14, 2026

1. Venue: Zilker Park - Reserved Pavilion 3 (CONFIRMED)
2. Catering: Franklin Barbecue - 30 guests - brisket, ribs, sides ($1,200)
3. Cake: Quack's 43rd Street Bakery - 3-tier vanilla ($185)
4. Decorations: Party City order #PC-29481 - balloons, streamers, banner
5. Music: DJ Marcus confirmed 2-6 PM ($400)
6. Invitations: Sent to 35 guests, 28 RSVPs received
7. Parking: Overflow lot reserved
8. Ice and coolers: John picking up morning of
9. Photographer: Sarah volunteered
10. Cleanup crew: John, Mike, Sabrina
